Alice took a mulligan.
Alice took a mulligan.
Bob took a mulligan.

Alice's Turn 1

Alice drew 1 card.
Alice played Magikarp to the Bench.
Alice played Professor's Research (Supporter).
Alice attached Water Energy to Gyarados.

Bob's Turn 1

Bob drew 1 card.
Bob played Medicham V to the Bench.
Bob's Medicham V used Yoga Loop on Alice's Gyarados for 110 damage.
Alice's Gyarados was Knocked Out!
Bob took 2 Prize cards.

Alice's Turn 2

Alice drew 1 card.
Alice switched in Magikarp to the Active Spot.
